fields.evidence: Hero: 'Instant Green/Amber/Red assessments on every opportunity. Set your criteria once, evaluate deals consistently forever.' (DOM, deal-findrs.vercel.app)
Hero: 'Stop Guessing. Start Knowing.' (DOM) + /reports: 'Stop rebuilding the same feasibility spreadsheet' (DOM)
/reports page: 'Every report reads from the opportunity record, in dependency order: QS → Valuation → Feasibility → Affordable Gap → Finance Pack' (DOM)
Pricing page footer: 'All plans include SSL encryption, daily backups, and Australian data hosting.' (DOM) + repo shows 'en-AU' locale, AUD currency, Australian throughout
CONFLICT: Hero says 'For buyers' agents & property firms' BUT body says 'Built by developers, for developers'. No single coherent archetype stated.
Hero: 'property development promoters' (DOM) + /reports: 'Every report your broker, valuer, and lender actually want' (DOM)
Hero subhead: 'The AI-powered platform that gives property development promoters instant Green/Amber/Red assessments' (DOM)
/reports: 'Outputs the IRR, ROC, and peak debt the lender will ask for in the first meeting' (DOM)

P2.evidence: No named distributor archetype; hero says 'buyers agents and property firms' but body says 'developers' - conflicting, no single archetype

P3.evidence: Gate questions not answered: no stated distributor, no stated 'why them', no stated 'why this problem why now', no stated 'how does it grow their business'

P4.evidence: No scale-infra (multi-tenant, billing, white-label as product) surfaced pre-GO - evident from single-tenant signup flow
